name: Polyplank AB (publ)
summary: PolyPlank AB (publ) manufactures and sells recyclable products from recycled plastic and wood fiber waste primarily in Sweden. The company offers terrace dividers, screening, and fences; balconies and access galleries; and sheds for garbage bins or bicycle storage for building companies. It also provides noise reduction systems for transport administration, real estate companies, industrial companies, municipalities, and construction companies; terrace profiles; and core plugs. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in F√É¬§rjestaden, Sweden.
